# virtuacloud_account (Data Source)

Retrieve account information for the authenticated Virtua.Cloud user.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `balance` (String) Current account balance.
- `cloud_servers_limit` (String) Maximum number of cloud servers allowed.
- `currency` (String) Account currency (e.g. EUR).
- `monthly_cloud_usage` (String) Current monthly cloud usage.
- `monthly_cloud_usage_estimate` (String) Estimated monthly cloud usage at end of month.
- `outstanding_balance` (String) Outstanding account balance.
- `timezone` (String) Account timezone.
- `today_cloud_usage` (String) Today's cloud usage.
